overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a medieval European town. The character navigates cobblestone streets, briefly enters a dimly lit building, and walks through town squares populated with NPCs and animals under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor with brick walls

events.description: exits narrow corridor into open cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: walking down stone stairs through a narrow corridor and emerging into the town

entered.detail: tall red brick wall forming the right side of the narrow passage
rough stone wall on the left side with small windows
wooden safety railing along the descending staircase
stone archway marking the exit from the corridor to the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, dimly lit stone corridor with brick walls. Geralt descends a short staircase and exits through a stone archway into the bright cobblestone streets of a medieval town.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town street with timber houses

events.description: approaches and enters a building with dark interior

agents.ego_description: walking through the town street passing villagers and market stalls

notable_agents.action: villager in green dress walking ahead on the right side

entered.detail: traditional half-timbered medieval house with white plaster and dark beams
stone building with arched windows and weathered facade
wooden market stall with fabric awning

segments.scene_description: Walking through a sunlit medieval town street with cobblestone pavement. Timber-framed houses line the path while villagers walk about. The character approaches a building entrance on the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit building interior with wooden shelves

events.description: enters dark building interior from bright sunlight
exits building back into bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: entering a building, briefly exploring the dark interior, then exiting back to the street

entered.detail: dark interior space of a medieval building with minimal lighting
wooden shelving units with various items against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark building interior, revealing wooden shelves and dim lighting. After a brief moment inside, the character exits back into the bright sunlight of the town street.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with market tables and horse

events.description: exits building and enters open town square area

agents.ego_description: walking through the open town square passing by market tables and animals

notable_agents.action: black horse standing near a wooden cart on the right side of the square

entered.detail: wooden tables and benches arranged in the town square
wooden cart with wheels parked near the horse
tall stone tower visible in the distance beyond the square

segments.scene_description: Back outside in a sunlit town square with cobblestone ground. Wooden tables are arranged on the left while a black horse stands near a cart on the right. The character walks through the moderate crowd of villagers toward a distant stone tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street with brick archway and campfire

events.description: passes under a large brick archway into a narrower street
ground becomes wet and muddy, campfire visible on the right

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrower street passing under a brick archway and by a campfire

notable_agents.action: pigs roaming freely on the cobblestone street

entered.detail: large red brick archway spanning the street
burning campfire with people gathered around it
wooden well structure with roof covering

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrower cobblestone street, passing under a prominent brick archway. The ground appears wet and muddy near a burning campfire on the right. Pigs roam freely in the street as the character continues past a wooden well and various timber houses.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dim, enclosed stone corridor into the bright, bustling atmosphere of a sunlit medieval town. It begins as Geralt descends a short staircase and passes through a stone archway, emerging from the shadows into a vibrant street lined with timber-framed houses and walking villagers. The camera then follows him as he briefly dips into the darkness of a building interior filled with wooden shelves before stepping back out into the brilliant light of a town square. This open space expands to reveal wooden tables, a black horse by a cart, and a crowd of people as the character moves toward a distant stone tower. Finally, the scene shifts into a narrower, muddier street where the camera passes under a brick archway and by a burning campfire, gliding past roaming pigs and a wooden well.
